widgets_values: Create a 1-2 sentence description of the character. Start by establishing what the character is and focus on a physical description and outfit
Select the LoRA to add to the text
Select the Wildcard to add to the text
NOTE - Either load from last group or drop in WIP image
NOTE - you may need to play with seeds to ensure lighting images do not affect original structure. Super simple prompts seem to maintain original structure better

nodes.title: PROMPT
widgets_values: a boy with fluffy blond hair, green eyes, textured light blue jeans, a worn red ((fuzzy sweater)), red converse and freckles

nodes.title: STYLE + QUALITY
widgets_values: masterpiece, best quality, photorealistic, 3d animation style, extremely high detail, Pixar, character sheet, frontal view, t-pose, portrait, ((all characters in full focus))
